map_implementation_notes: Use a province-level route map for intercity movement: Shanghai → Nanchang → Jiujiang/Lushan → Jingdezhen → Shangrao/Sanqingshan → Shanghai.
Use separate resort/city focus maps for Lushan, Jingdezhen, and Sanqingshan.
For lodging cards, geocode address strings from lodging_options.json. Keep map_query/address editable in data.
If using AMap/Gaode, keep API key in .env. If using Leaflet/OpenStreetMap, avoid Chinese map tile reliability issues by testing deployment target.
Handmade route sketches should be preserved as images in /public/sketches/. If exact image files are not available, create placeholders and document expected filenames.

sketch_assets_expected.description: Handmade/Notion figure for 庐山路线图. Preserve in webpage; optionally recreate as GIS/interactive map overlay.
